title: Evolution as backstop for reinforcement learning
description: Multi-level optimization problems with competing timescales, and why the slow, painful ground truth (ex: evolution) is always better than efficient/sophisticated systems (ex: the brain).

title: No Solvency, No Security
description: The budgetary dimensions of deterrence matter. Production is deterrence, the factory is the weapon.

title: 1000 Players Simulate Civilization: Rich & Poor
description: Simulating civilization in minecraft. Not a technical simulation, but I thought this has interesting storytelling.

title: Game Theory #1: The Dating Game
description: Game theoretic perspective on how humans date, and why certain cultures win and lose.
